mapper.sql: id, user_id, article_id, parent_id, reply_to_user_id, reply_to_comment_id, content, content_html, like_count, dislike_count, `status`, is_author, ip, user_agent, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into comment (user_id, article_id, parent_id, reply_to_user_id, reply_to_comment_id, content, content_html, like_count, dislike_count, `status`, is_author, ip, user_agent, created_at, updated_at ) values (#{user_id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{article_id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{parent_id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{reply_to_user_id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{reply_to_comment_id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content_html,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{like_count,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{dislike_count,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{is_author,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ip,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{user_agent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updated_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )

insert into comment
user_id,
article_id,
parent_id,
reply_to_user_id,
reply_to_comment_id,
content,
content_html,
like_count,
dislike_count,
`status`,
is_author,
ip,

updated_at,

mapper.update:
update comment
user_id = #{user_id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
article_id = #{article_id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
parent_id = #{parent_id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
reply_to_user_id = #{reply_to_user_id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
reply_to_comment_id = #{reply_to_comment_id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
content_html = #{content_html,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
like_count = #{like_count,jdbcType=INTEGER},
dislike_count = #{dislike_count,jdbcType=INTEGER},
`status` = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_author = #{is_author,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ip = #{ip,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_agent = #{user_agent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_at = #{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updated_at = #{updated_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update comment set user_id = #{user_id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, article_id = #{article_id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, parent_id = #{parent_id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, reply_to_user_id = #{reply_to_user_id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, reply_to_comment_id = #{reply_to_comment_id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, content_html = #{content_html,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, like_count = #{like_count,jdbcType=INTEGER}, dislike_count = #{dislike_count,jdbcType=INTEGER}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_author = #{is_author,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ip = #{ip,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_agent = #{user_agent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_at = #{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_at = #{updated_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
